cases: exact commit/path bindings accepted with bounded claim

observed: The verifier and five deterministic tests are committed.
All five tests passed in an isolated Node runtime using byte-identical source before commit.
No canonical shared-state file was overwritten.
inferred: When supplied an authenticated immutable inventory, the verifier can prevent queue compaction from accepting missing or misbound output references.
proposed: Integrate the verifier after complete queue-update enumeration and before candidate compaction emission.
superseded: Treating a syntactically valid queue update as sufficient evidence that every referenced path and commit exists.
unresolved: Complete authenticated enumeration of all queue updates and repository paths.
Cryptographic or provider-backed trust for the inventory constructor.
privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract queue semantics only; excludes raw private chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads.
limits: Reference existence does not prove artifact semantics, runtime behavior, deployment, peer execution, or human outcome.
Inventory trust remains external and must come from an authenticated immutable repository view.
